---
name: "🚫 Strategic No (Rejection Log)"
about: Encode a specific AI failure or methodological flaw into an institutional constraint.
title: "[NO]: Brief description of the failure"
labels: rejection-log, enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Recognition (The Detection)
*Paste the specific output, screenshot link, or reasoning segment that failed to meet the WFI quality bar.*

> [Insert Failure Here]

**Initial Assessment:** *Describe the "gut feeling" or domain-specific observation of the error.*

## 2. Articulation (The Reasoning)
**Primary Failure Mode:**
- [ ] **Category Error:** (e.g., sensitivity vs. capacity)
- [ ] **Taxonomic Overreach:** (e.g., vertebrate vs. invertebrate logic)
- [ ] **Conceptual Gap:** (e.g., modulation-vs-cap distinction)
- [ ] **Weak Steel-Manning:** (e.g., misrepresentation of counter-arguments)
- [ ] **UX/Documentation Friction:** (e.g., website/manual lack of clarity)
- [ ] **Emergent Rejection:** (Explain below)

**Detailed Explanation:**
*Explain exactly why the logic failed. What domain-specific fact or methodological standard was violated?*

## 3. Encoding (The Constraint)
**Proposed New Rule:**
*Draft a specific instruction that prevents this error from recurring.*

> **"Whenever analyzing [X], the model must always [Y] and avoid [Z]."**

## 4. Verification Frontier Status
- [ ] This constraint has been added to the relevant GPT/Tool instructions.
- [ ] This constraint has been added to the Institute’s core documentation.
